name: bounded-linalg-i32-binary-rvv-scalar-artifact-pipeline
title: Bounded linalg i32 binary frontend to selected RVV scalar artifact pipeline
description: Focused proof for the one-command bounded linalg i32-vsub+i32m2 frontend to selected RVV+scalar dispatch artifact bundle route.
creator: codex
notes: Completed: strengthened the existing linalg i32-vsub+i32m2 one-command bundle test for selected RVV shape metadata, runtime ABI roles, mem-window roles, dispatch guard/fallback linkage, and selected bundle records; added a negative front-door marker/body mismatch test that fails before bundle emission. No new ssh rvv evidence was needed; 5db3128 remains latest runtime evidence.
